_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model inventory management practices, including model tiering by materiality and complexity, risk classification, lifecycle tracking from development through retirement, and the documentation standards required at each stage.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-K-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-020 (AI, cosine: 0.457), DQ-K-010 (DQ, cosine: 0.451).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.434). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [collection, strategies] vs WIDAI-only terms [classification, complexity, development, documentation, inventory, lifecycle] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.892 (P=0.937, R=0.851). P exceeds R by 0.086 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Knowledge of collection strategies." and "Knowledge of model inventory management practices, including model tiering by ma" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.493 > STS 0.434 (gap +0.059). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.9%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [collection, strategies]. WIDAI-only: [classification, complexity, development, documentation, inventory, lifecycle].
